settings.title: Settings

preferences.partialLocaleNote: Some app areas are still English.

recovery.title: Recovery (Development Only)
recovery.body: Temporary scroll-only recovery controls for debugging offscreen notes without changing stored positions.

settings.staticNote: Note: This static version saves notes only in this browser on this device. Account sign-in, cloud sync, billing, and cross-device recovery are not available in this mode. Clearing site data or using a different browser/device can make these notes unavailable.

mermaid.title: Mermaid Import
mermaid.descriptionBeforeAction: Turn a supported Mermaid flowchart or graph into ordinary Postbaby notes and edges. Paste Mermaid source below, then click
mermaid.descriptionAfterAction: when you are ready to create notes.
mermaid.placeholder:
flowchart LR
Idea --> Task
Task --> Done

toasts.loadDataInputMissing: Error: Unable to find load data input.
toasts.importedLocalSignInAgain: Imported locally. Sign in again to sync this backup. Reloading...
toasts.importedLocalReconnect: Imported locally. Reconnect to sync this backup. Reloading...
toasts.importedLocalServerAvailable: Imported locally. Postbaby will sync this backup when the server is available. Reloading...
toasts.invalidFileFormat: Failed to load data: Invalid file format.

deleteItem.gesture: right-click item or drag to toilet-roll

emptyCanvasDrag.gesture: marquee in select mode / pan in hand mode

panCanvas.gesture: mouse wheel, trackpad scroll, shift + wheel, middle-drag, or space + drag

changeColor.gesture: single tap on item or tab

navigateCanvas.gesture: two-finger pinch / pan or camera controls

status.warningsSummary: Review the warnings below if you want to simplify or adjust the imported shapes.
status.ordinarySummary: These are now ordinary Postbaby notes and edges.
status.validationFailedMessage: Nothing was imported. Fix the Mermaid source below and try again.
status.unexpectedFailedMessage: Nothing was imported. An unexpected error prevented Mermaid import.

issues.unsupportedDiagramType: Unsupported Mermaid diagram type "{diagramType}". Only flowchart/graph TD, TB, and LR are supported.
issues.invalidDiagramHeader: Mermaid source must start with flowchart/graph TD, TB, or LR.
issues.invalidNodeReference: Node references must not be empty.
issues.unsupportedNodeShape: Mermaid parallelogram nodes are not supported yet and were normalized to the default Postbaby shape.
issues.conflictingNodeLabel: Node "{nodeId}" was defined with multiple labels. Keeping the first non-empty label "{label}".
issues.conflictingNodeShape: Node "{nodeId}" was defined with multiple shapes. Keeping the earlier Mermaid-compatible shape mapping "{shape}".
issues.invalidSource: Mermaid source must be a string.
issues.missingDiagramHeader: Mermaid source must include a supported flowchart/graph header.
issues.missingActiveTab: Postbaby does not have an active tab for graph creation.
issues.missingActiveTabRecord: The active tab record could not be found for graph creation.
issues.missingActiveGrid: The active grid container is not available for graph creation.
issues.tabItemLimitExceeded: This import is too large for one tab.
issues.tabEdgeLimitExceeded: This import is too large for one tab.
